code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as MCP Client
    participant Tool as MCP Tool
    participant APIClient as API Client
    participant RateLimiter as Rate Limiter
    participant CircuitBreaker as Circuit Breaker
    participant BaseClient as BaseAPIClient
    participant OAuth as OAuth2 Handler
    participant OPERA as OPERA Cloud API

    Client->>Tool: Invoke tool (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    activate Tool
    Tool->>APIClient: Call API method
    activate APIClient

    APIClient->>RateLimiter: Check rate limit
    activate RateLimiter

    alt Rate limit exceeded
        RateLimiter-->>APIClient: Throttled (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
        APIClient->>APIClient: Calculate wait time
        RateLimiter->>RateLimiter: Wait for token refill
        RateLimiter-->>APIClient: Proceed
    end

    deactivate RateLimiter

    APIClient->>CircuitBreaker: Check circuit state
    activate CircuitBreaker

    alt Circuit is OPEN
        CircuitBreaker-->>APIClient: CircuitOpenException
        APIClient-->>Tool: Error: Service temporarily unavailable
    else Circuit is CLOSED/HALF-OPEN
        CircuitBreaker-->>APIClient: Allow request
    end

    deactivate CircuitBreaker

    APIClient->>BaseClient: Make HTTP request
    activate BaseClient

    BaseClient->>OAuth: Get access token
    activate OAuth
    OAuth-->>BaseClient: Bearer token
    deactivate OAuth

    BaseClient->>OPERA: GET /api/v1/reservations
    Note over BaseClient,OPERA: Authorization: Bearer {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}
    activate OPERA

    alt Success Response (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 200 OK + JSON data
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record success
        CircuitBreaker->>CircuitBreaker: Reset failure count
        BaseClient->>RateLimiter: Record success
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Transform response
        BaseClient-->>APIClient: Response(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    else Client Error (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 400/404/401 etc.
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Classify error
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record failure
        BaseClient-->>APIClient: Response(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    else Server Error (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
        OPERA-->>BaseClient: 500/502/503 etc.
        BaseClient->>BaseClient: Check retry eligibility
        BaseClient->>CircuitBreaker: Record failure

        alt Below failure threshold
            BaseClient->>BaseClient: Calculate backoff (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
            BaseClient->>BaseClient: Wait {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}ms
            BaseClient->>OPERA: Retry request
        else Exceeds failure threshold
            CircuitBreaker->>CircuitBreaker: Trip to OPEN
            BaseClient-->>APIClient: CircuitBreakerException
        end
    end

    deactivate OPERA
    deactivate BaseClient

    APIClient->>APIClient: Update metrics
    APIClient-->>Tool: Return result
    deactivate APIClient

    Tool-->>Client: Return formatted data
    deactivate Tool
repo_description: Unofficial Opera Cloud API MCP Server

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个MCP Client调用HealthTech患者记录查询的完整时序图。核心场景是：MCP Client通过MCP Tool去调OPERA Cloud API，中间要体现熔断、限流、OAuth2这些治理层。
明白，这个链路涉及多个中间层。我先确认一下参与者：最左边是MCP Client，然后MCP Tool作为实际执行方，接下来是API Client、Rate Limiter、Circuit Breaker、BaseAPIClient、OAuth2 Handler，最右边是OPERA Cloud API。这样七层结构对吗？
对的，七层。注意BaseAPIClient是实际发HTTP请求的，API Client主要是做编排和状态检查。
好的，我先画出参与者横排。接下来画主链路：MCP Client调用MCP Tool，标注Invoke tool (HealthTech_PatientRecords)，然后Tool激活后调用API Client的Call API method。
在API Client这里要先过Rate Limiter。需要画一个alt分支：如果Rate limit exceeded，Rate Limiter返回Throttled给API Client，然后API Client内部Calculate wait time，Rate Limiter自己Wait for token refill，最后Proceed。
Rate Limiter的alt分支画好了，包括超限时返回Throttled (HealthTech_PatientRecords)的标注。接下来API Client要检查Circuit Breaker状态？
是的，这是第二个alt分支。Circuit is OPEN时直接返回CircuitOpenException给API Client，然后API Client回给Tool一个Error: Service temporarily unavailable。如果是CLOSED或HALF-OPEN才放行。
Circuit Breaker的两个分支画好了。现在进入正常流程：API Client调用BaseAPIClient的Make HTTP request，BaseAPIClient先找OAuth2 Handler拿token。
OAuth2 Handler返回Bearer token，然后BaseAPIClient发GET /api/v1/reservations到OPERA Cloud API。这里要加一个Note，标注Authorization: Bearer {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}，表示token是从HIPAA Vault取的。
Note加好了，覆盖在BaseAPIClient和OPERA之间。现在OPERA Cloud API被激活，需要画响应的分支逻辑？

对，OPERA返回这里要分三个alt分支。第一个是Success Response (HealthTech_PatientRecords)：200 OK加JSON数据，然后BaseAPIClient通知Circuit Breaker Record success，Circuit Breaker自己Reset failure count，同时BaseAPIClient也通知Rate Limiter Record success，最后BaseAPIClient Transform response后返回Response(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)给API Client。
成功分支画好了，包括Circuit Breaker和Rate Limiter的双向反馈。第二个分支是Client Error？
第二个分支是Client Error (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)：400/404/401这些，BaseAPIClient内部Classify error，然后通知Circuit Breaker Record failure，最后仍然返回Response(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)给API Client。注意这里不触发熔断，只是记录失败。
Client Error分支完成。第三个分支是Server Error，涉及重试逻辑？

第三个最复杂：Server Error (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)，500/502/503这些。BaseAPIClient先Check retry eligibility，通知Circuit Breaker Record failure，然后内嵌一个alt：如果Below failure threshold，BaseAPIClient Calculate backoff (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)，Wait {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}ms，然后Retry request到OPERA；如果Exceeds failure threshold，Circuit Breaker Trip to OPEN，BaseAPIClient返回CircuitBreakerException给API Client。
Server Error分支画好了，包括重试的内嵌alt和熔断跳闸逻辑。现在OPERA和BaseAPIClient可以关闭，然后API Client做Update metrics，返回给Tool，最后Tool返回给MCP Client？
对的，API Client Update metrics后Return result给Tool，Tool Return formatted data给MCP Client。所有激活的生命线都要正确关闭。
所有生命线和激活块都画好了。我检查一下：MCP Client→Tool→API Client→Rate Limiter(alt)→Circuit Breaker(alt)→BaseAPIClient→OAuth→OPERA，然后OPERA返回的三个alt分支，包括成功时的双向反馈、客户端错误、服务器错误带重试和熔断。
等等，Server Error分支里，Circuit Breaker Record failure的位置对吗？应该是在Check retry eligibility之后、内嵌alt之前，这样无论重试与否都先记一次失败。
你说得对，我调整一下。BaseAPIClient先Check retry eligibility，然后立即通知Circuit Breaker Record failure，之后再进入Below/Exceeds的内嵌alt判断。这样失败记录就不会漏掉。
没问题了。另外确认一下Note的位置：Authorization: Bearer {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}这个标注要横跨BaseAPIClient到OPERA的调用线，表示实际请求头里的token来源。
Note位置确认正确，横跨BaseAPIClient和OPERA之间的消息线。整个时序图现在完整了：从MCP Client发起HealthTech_PatientRecords查询，经过限流、熔断、OAuth2认证，到OPERA Cloud API，再处理三种响应场景，最终返回格式化数据。
